sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16914" key="a)sxisto/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσχιστόπους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ουν</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n16914.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not having cloven hoofs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:521:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">521.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
